meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template & Testing Guide
content.seo_description: Overcome testing anxiety as a freelancer. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship bulletproof apps fast. Beginner-friendly checklist.
content.answer_block: Stop skipping tests because of complexity. The Antigravity project template automates test scaffolding, while Claude Code executes the logic. By integrating these, you offload the cognitive burden of test-driven development, ensuring your client deliverables are bug-free, robust, and delivered significantly faster than manual development cycles.
content.intro:
The dread is palpable: you've built a beautiful feature, the client is waiting, and you realize you have zero test coverage. You know a production bug will cost you hours of frantic debugging and your professional reputation. The cycle of 'code-ship-break-fix' is the silent killer of freelance careers.

But what if testing wasn't a chore, but an automated side effect of your build process? With the Antigravity project template and Claude Code, you don't need a PhD in software engineering to ship production-grade code. We are moving from manual verification to algorithmic assurance, allowing you to scale your freelance business without the technical debt.

steps.title: Initialize with Antigravity
steps.description: Scaffold a project structure that includes built-in test hooks to ensure your foundation is solid from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new production-ready SaaS project template that includes a pre-configured test suite using Vitest and Playwright.

steps.title: Define Test Specs via Natural Language
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate feature requirements directly into functional test files before writing the implementation code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing requirements and generate a comprehensive integration test suite for the authentication module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate integration tests for auth module based on project specs"

steps.title: Execute TDD Cycles
steps.description: Force the code to pass your generated tests, ensuring that every feature you add is verified against your criteria.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the login logic ensuring it satisfies all generated test cases while maintaining clean architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement login logic and verify against tests"

steps.title: Automate Regression Checks
steps.description: Set up a watch mode that runs your test suite every time a file changes, preventing regressions in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project environment to execute full regression tests on every file save.

steps.title: Final Verification & Delivery
steps.description: Perform a final automated smoke test to ensure the production build is stable for client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a final audit of the test suite and confirm all coverage metrics meet enterprise standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "execute smoke tests and generate coverage report"

pro_tips: Always generate 'negative path' tests; clients love when you prove the app handles errors gracefully.
Use Claude Code to document your tests so you don't have to explain your logic to the client later.
Keep your test files decoupled from your business logic for easier refactoring during client revisions.
Run your test suite locally before pushing to GitHub to save CI/CD minutes and costs.
Tag your tests by feature name to selectively run suites instead of the entire project during quick updates.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live with tests, integrate a CI pipeline to automate these checks on every git push.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing if your code works. Start shipping with the confidence of a lead engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
